headline: Salesforce (CRM) Lands Broad Air Force Role Managing A Global Military Vehicle Fleet
summary: Salesforce's Missionforce National Security platform has been broadly adopted by the U.S. Air Force for global fleet management. The 441st Vehicle Support Chain Operations Squadron is using Missionforce to manage vehicles and support mission readiness across worldwide operations. The rollout reflects increased use of secure cloud and AI-integrated tools in mission-critical U.S. defense logistics. Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) is drawing fresh attention after the U.S. Air Force moved to wide...
